ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "trivia" TEXT /* Trivia or interesting facts about the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Run time of the movie */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the distributors table */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the directors table */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the writers table */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "domestic" REAL /* Domestic box office revenue */,
  "international" REAL /* International box office revenue */,
  "worldwide" REAL /* Worldwide box office revenue */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID for the movie */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_id" TEXT /* Rotten Tomatoes ID for the movie */,
  "metacritic_id" TEXT /* Metacritic ID for the movie */,
  "html" TEXT /* HTML link to external resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the actor (if applicable) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director (if applicable) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the writer */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the writer (if applicable) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the MPAA rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MPAA rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "domestic_revenue" REAL /* Domestic box office revenue */,
  "international_revenue" REAL /* International box office revenue */,
  "worldwide_revenue" REAL /* Worldwide box office revenue */,
  "opening_weekend" REAL /* Opening weekend box office revenue */,
  "opening_weekend_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening weekend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_ratings" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MPAA rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the review (1-10) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
column_names: Trivia or interesting facts about the movie
Foreign key referencing the distributors table
Foreign key referencing the directors table
Foreign key referencing the writers table
Rotten Tomatoes ID for the movie
Death date of the actor (if applicable)
Death date of the director (if applicable)
Death date of the writer (if applicable)
Unique identifier for each financial record
Role of the actor in the movie
